message:
Summary: ORIGINAL_OBJECTIVE: Create a full-stack restaurant management application using Next.js 14 with TypeScript and the App Router. The project should include authentication. Here are the exact files to create:

1. package.json — with dependencies: next, react, react-dom, typescript, next-auth, prisma, @prisma/client, bcryptjs, zod
2. tsconfig.json — standard Next.js TypeScript config
3. next.config.js — Next.js configuration
4. prisma/schema.prisma — Prisma schema with User, Restaurant, MenuItem, Order, and OrderItem models
5. src/app/layout.tsx — Root layout with SessionProvider wrapper
6. src/app/page.tsx — Landing page with hero section and navigation
7. src/app/globals.css — Global styles with Tailwind-like utility classes
8. src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts — NextAuth configuration with credentials provider
9. src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts — REST API for CRUD restaurants (GET, POST)
10. src/app/api/menu/route.ts — REST API for menu items (GET, POST)
11. src/app/api/orders/route.ts — REST API for orders (GET, POST)
12. src/app/dashboard/page.tsx — Dashboard page showing restaurants and stats
13. src/app/menu/page.tsx — Menu management page with add/edit/delete
14. src/app/orders/page.tsx — Orders page with status tracking
15. src/app/auth/login/page.tsx — Login page with form
16. src/app/auth/register/page.tsx — Registration page with form
17. src/lib/prisma.ts — Prisma client singleton
18. src/lib/auth.ts — Auth utilities and session helpers
19. src/components/Navbar.tsx — Navigation bar with auth state
20. src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx — Restaurant display card component
21. src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx — Form component for adding/editing menu items
22. src/components/OrderTable.tsx — Table component for displaying orders
23. src/middleware.ts — NextAuth middleware for protected routes
24. .env.example — Environment variables template

Create all 24 files with complete, working TypeScript code. Each file should have proper imports, types, and error handling.

USER_CONTEXT:
- Framework: Next.js 14 (App Router)
- Language: TypeScript
- Database: Prisma (SQLite configured in schema)
- Auth: NextAuth.js
- Styling: Tailwind CSS (implied by globals.css requirements)

TASK_TRACKING:
- TASK_01: Create package.json [COMPLETED]
- TASK_02: Create tsconfig.json [COMPLETED]
- TASK_03: Create next.config.js [COMPLETED]
- TASK_04: Create prisma/schema.prisma [COMPLETED]
- TASK_05: Create src/app/layout.tsx [PENDING]
- TASK_06: Create src/app/page.tsx [PENDING]
- TASK_07: Create src/app/globals.css [COMPLETED]
- TASK_08: Create src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts [PENDING]
- TASK_09: Create src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts [PENDING]
- TASK_10: Create src/app/api/menu/route.ts [PENDING]
- TASK_11: Create src/app/api/orders/route.ts [PENDING]
- TASK_12: Create src/app/dashboard/page.tsx [PENDING]
- TASK_13: Create src/app/menu/page.tsx [PENDING]
- TASK_14: Create src/app/orders/page.tsx [PENDING]
- TASK_15: Create src/app/auth/login/page.tsx [PENDING]
- TASK_16: Create src/app/auth/register/page.tsx [PENDING]
- TASK_17: Create src/lib/prisma.ts [COMPLETED]
- TASK_18: Create src/lib/auth.ts [PENDING]
- TASK_19: Create src/components/Navbar.tsx [PENDING]
- TASK_20: Create src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx [PENDING]
- TASK_21: Create src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx [PENDING]
- TASK_22: Create src/components/OrderTable.tsx [PENDING]
- TASK_23: Create src/middleware.ts [PENDING]
- TASK_24: Create .env.example [PENDING]

COMPLETED:
- Initialized project structure and directories.
- Created configuration files: `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `next.config.js`.
- Defined Prisma schema with User, Restaurant, MenuItem, Order, and OrderItem models.
- Created Prisma client singleton in `src/lib/prisma.ts`.
- Created global CSS with Tailwind directives.
- Created `src/components/Providers.tsx` (Client Component) to wrap the application with `SessionProvider`.

PENDING:
- Implementation of all API routes (Auth, Restaurants, Menu, Orders).
- Implementation of all UI pages (Landing, Dashboard, Menu, Orders, Auth).
- Implementation of shared components (Navbar, Cards, Forms, Tables).
- Middleware and environment template.

CODE_STATE:
- `package.json`: Includes next, react, next-auth, prisma, bcryptjs, zod.
- `prisma/schema.prisma`: SQLite provider, includes all requested models.
- `src/lib/prisma.ts`: Standard singleton pattern for PrismaClient.
- `src/components/Providers.tsx`: Client component for NextAuth session context.

CHANGES:
- Created directories for App Router structure and API routes.
- Added `src/components/Providers.tsx` to facilitate the `SessionProvider` requirement for `layout.tsx`.

CredentialsProvider from "next-auth/providers/credentials";4	import { prisma } from "@/lib/prisma";5	import bcrypt from "bcryptjs";6	7	export const authOptions: NextAuthOptions = {8	  adapter: PrismaAdapter(prisma),9	  session: {10	    strategy: "jwt",11	  },12	  pages: {13	    signIn: "/login",14	  },15	  providers: [16	    CredentialsProvider({17	      name: "credentials",18	      credentials: {19	        email: { label: "Email", type: "email" },20	        password: { label: "Password", type: "password" },21	      },22	      async authorize(credentials) {23	        if (!credentials?.email || !credentials?.password) {24	          throw new Error("Invalid credentials");25	        }26	27	        const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({28	          where: {29	            email: credentials.email,30	          },31	        });32	33	        if (!user || !user.password) {34	          throw new Error("Invalid credentials");35	        }36	37	        const isPasswordCorrect = await bcrypt.compare(38	          credentials.password,39	          user.password40	        );41	42	        if (!isPasswordCorrect) {43	          throw new Error("Invalid credentials");44	        }45	46	        return {47	          id: user.id,48	          email: user.email,49	          name: user.name,50	          role: user.role,51	        };52	      },53	    }),54	  ],55	  callbacks: {56	    async jwt({ token, user }) {57	      if (user) {58	        return {59	          ...token,60	          id: user.id,61	          role: (user as any).role,62	        };63	      }64	      return token;65	    },66	    async session({ session, token }) {67	      return {68	        ...session,69	        user: {70	          ...session.user,71	          id: token.id,72	          role: token.role,73	        },74	      };75	    },76	  },77	};
